---
title: "Rapid traversal of vast chemical space using machine learning-guided docking screens"
author: 
- Luttens
- Cabeza de Vaca
- Sparring
- et al.
publication: "Nat Comput Sci, **5**, 301–312 (2025)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - medicinal-chemistry
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s43588-025-00777-x
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nat Comput Sci"
issue: 5
page: 301–312
year: 2025
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s43588-025-00777-x
---
